college_info.college_name: Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT): Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT) admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: How can I get into Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT) for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
After 10th Diploma Candidate must have passed 10th Std/ SSC Examination from a recognised board.
UG Diploma Candidate must have passed 10th Std/ SSC Examination from a recognised board.
B.E. / B.Tech Candidate who have passed minimum 3 years Diploma Examination with at least 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) subject to vacancies in the First Year, in case the vacancies at lateral entry are exhausted.

faqs.question: How is the faculty at Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT)?
faqs.answer: Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT) has been rated 4.3 for faculty as per reviews by students. This shows that Institute has qualified and experienced faculty members.

faqs.question: What facilities are there at Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT) in terms of infrastructure?
faqs.answer: Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT) has been rated 3.6 on Infrastructure parameter. Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT) provide good facilities all around the campus such as A/C ClassroomsAuditorium, Cafeteria, Gym, Hospital / Medical Facilities, Hostel, Labs, Library, Shuttle Service, Sports Complex, Wi-Fi Campus. Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT) has also been rated 4 for Campuslife.

faqs.question: Does Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT) provide good placement facilities?
faqs.answer: Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT) has been rated 4.3 on placements.

placements.overview:
Established in 2011, Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT) is a private institute in Faridabad, Haryana. The institute is approved by the AICTE. At the UG, PG and After 10th levels, the institute offers 20 courses across 5 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT) programs include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, BCA and BBA. Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT) courses are provided in several streams including Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 1134 students. The fees at Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT) ranges between INR 90,000 to 2,40,000 for the different courses. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT) is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT) programmes is around INR 90,000 to 2,40,000.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT) is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT) programmes is around INR 90,000 to 2,40,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Pt. L.R. College of Technology.

review_content.Placements: The placements of the college are better. Most of the companies give jobs to the last year of the semester. Most of the companies visit our college for placements. The average package of the college is 1.8 LPA. Most passout students doing jobs in their field.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is better. Wi-Fi facility is not provided to the students. Mess and canteen facilities are not provided to the students. Most of the students are from the college location. Classrooms are very good and comfortable. Sports and games facilities are provided in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good college if we know how to do self-study.

review_content.Placements: About 60-80% of students got jobs. The highest package is around 12 LPA. The lowest is 5 LPA. Top recurring companies are JCB, Hitachi, and some vendor companies like Subros, etv Jr. engineer, web developer, Sr. civil engineer, etc., roles are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. Facilities are good. There are smart classes, computer labs, mechanics labs, an auditorium, chemistry labs, etc. I don't know about the food in the hostel. A hostel is available. Our college arranges cultural activities and sports activities from time to time.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for doing a diploma in any stream.

review_content.Placements: Companies like JBM, JCB, Escorts, and Tecumseh are available for recruiting. More than 40% of students are always selected for an internship from any course. Roles like junior engineer and diploma trainee engineer are offered in our courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, library, chemistry labs, computer labs, and seminar halls are available. In hostels, all facilities like a canteen, a medical emergency room, sports, and games are always available with their charges. Everything is good here for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, our college is extraordinary.

review_content.Placements: Overall, 75% of students were placed in my course. 12.5 LPA was the highest package offered last year. Many companies come to the college and conduct interviews and pick up the best students. IT companies from Gurugram came here last year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library of our college is well-maintained and has all the books for my course. All the playgrounds are available, like basketball, tennis, football etc. High-speed Wi-Fi is available. Computer labs are very well-maintained. The classrooms are air-conditioned.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good for Diploma engineering, and placements are good here.

review_content.Placements: 95% of students got placed in Diploma engineering. The highest package is 90,000, and the lowest salary is 30,000. Pharmacy is also available in our college. Many courses are available in our college. The teachers are good. Many events are held by the staff.
review_content.Infrastructure: AC and projectors are available in the classrooms. A library is available. Food quality is good. Medical facilities are good. Sports like volleyball, cricket, hockey and many other sports are available in our college, and students also go for state-level matches in volleyball and cricket.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: This college provides good placements around 99%.

review_content.Placements: Around 60% of students were placed. The highest salary package offered was 5.5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. Mahindra, Maruti Suzuki, JCB, Yamaha, Abb Motors, and TVs Motors were the top recruiting companies. Almost 40% of students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was average, and the building was old. Library, laboratories, and hostel were available in this college. The laboratories were good and clean. The canteen was average and it was small. Wi-Fi works only IT sector. The medical facilities were very good. Sports were also conducted in this college.

paragraphs: Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT) admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in streams includingEngineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software.Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT)admission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asJEE Main, HSTES, and CBSE 10th. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 90,000 - 2,40,000for UG, PG and After 10th level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 4 years.

Pt. L.R. College of Technology - Technical Campus (PLRCT) cutoff 2025 was released via HSTES entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 428845 and 610762 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 428845, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General HS category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 428845.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Pt. L.R. College of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is better. Wi-Fi facility is not provided to the students. Mess and canteen facilities are not provided to the students. Most of the students are from the college location. Classrooms are very good and comfortable. Sports and games facilities are provided in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good college if we know how to do self-study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Facilities are good. There are smart classes, computer labs, mechanics labs, an auditorium, chemistry labs, etc. I don't know about the food in the hostel. A hostel is available. Our college arranges cultural activities and sports activities from time to time.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for doing a diploma in any stream.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, library, chemistry labs, computer labs, and seminar halls are available. In hostels, all facilities like a canteen, a medical emergency room, sports, and games are always available with their charges. Everything is good here for students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is extraordinary.
reviews.review_text: The library of our college is well-maintained and has all the books for my course. All the playgrounds are available, like basketball, tennis, football etc. High-speed Wi-Fi is available. Computer labs are very well-maintained. The classrooms are air-conditioned.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for Diploma engineering, and placements are good here.
reviews.review_text: AC and projectors are available in the classrooms. A library is available. Food quality is good. Medical facilities are good. Sports like volleyball, cricket, hockey and many other sports are available in our college, and students also go for state-level matches in volleyball and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides good placements around 99%.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was average, and the building was old. Library, laboratories, and hostel were available in this college. The laboratories were good and clean. The canteen was average and it was small. Wi-Fi works only IT sector. The medical facilities were very good. Sports were also conducted in this college.

reviews.review_heading: I can promise you that this is the best college.
reviews.review_text: In my college, all the facilities are there such as the beautiful labs, playground, seminar halls and good staff. All the rules are agreed in my college, and students obey them. There are also projectors available in the class. There are also computer labs with Wi-Fi and a good hostel facility available in the college. Also, the canteen is available for 18 hours. Weekly fests are also conducted. According to me, everything is available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: It was good. The college was good for placement, infrastructure, and other facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college had nice infrastructure, and the infrastructure work was in progress. Once the building work was finished, the college had a nice look and improved infrastructure. Compared to other colleges, ours was the best for infrastructure.

college_info.college_name: SIEM - Surendra Institute of Engineering & Management: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: WBJEE 2026 registration has begun for SIEM - Surendra Institute of Engineering & Management admission to the BE/BTech course. Students can register till Apr 5, 2026, for the exam scheduled for May 24, 2026.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: SIEM - Surendra Institute of Engineering & Management offers diverse programmes at UG level in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. SIEM - Surendra Institute of Engineering & Management fee structure for all the courses is around INR 2,83,000 to 3,64,000.

faqs.answer: A:    SIEM - Surendra Institute of Engineering & Management is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at SIEM - Surendra Institute of Engineering & Management are Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by SIEM - Surendra Institute of Engineering & Management?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: This course was very helpful.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students had applied for off-campusing because the companies which had come for recruitment offered non-technical jobs. Since we were in the 4th batch to graduate, the number of companies that had come for placements were very less. I don't have much information about the salary packages offered to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was great. Hostel facilities were up to the mark but were provided only for boys. Women's hostel was not far from the college but was not owned by the institute. The quality of the food served was a real concern there. There is a proper infirmary inside the college. The library is stacked with books and has a very pleasant ambience.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members are good, but placements are not that good.

review_content.Placements: Around 30% of the students from our course were placed. The highest salary package offered was around 10 LPA, the minimum salary package offered was 2.75 LPA and the average salary package offered was around 4.0 LPA. Top recruiting companies that visited our college were Byju's, Wipro, Simplex Infrastructures, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is excellent, and the facilities provided are numerous. The library has many different collections of books and Wi-Fi facilities. Instruments in the labs are of all the latest versions and equipped with all the necessary instruments.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.

But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

overview_faqs.answer: SIEM - Surendra Institute of Engineering & Management is a renowned institution offering B.E. / B.Tech. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Engineering. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. review_summary.college_name: SIEM - Surendra Institute of Engineering & Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am really satisfied with our college.

content.Placements: About 85% of the students from our college get jobs in campus interviews. The salary package of 12 LPA was offered by Jaro Education, while 10 LPA was offered by Byju's. The average salary package offered is 5 LPA. Almost 70% of the students get internships from our course. Roles offered in our course are marketing manager and software developer.
content.Infrastructure: Our college doesn't have any hostel, but there are many PGs and messes near our college. Our college has state of the art labs, Wi-Fi on every corridor and a well-managed library. The quality of food served in our college canteen is very good and healthy. Medical facilities of our college are very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: In this college, I have spent my 4 years gaining knowledge and knowing people.

content.Placements: A lot of students from our batch got placements. I also got placement from our college. Every year a lot of students get their placements from our college. But if you are an academically good student, then you can get the job. If you are not good, it is tough for you to get a job.
content.Infrastructure: The library is huge with a lot of books and free Wi-Fi for study purpose. You will get daily newspapers in different languages. Lots of comic books are also available just to feel relaxed from the study pressure. The only drawback of our college is it doesn't have its own hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: This course was very helpful.

content.Placements: Most of the students had applied for off-campusing because the companies which had come for recruitment offered non-technical jobs. Since we were in the 4th batch to graduate, the number of companies that had come for placements were very less. I don't have much information about the salary packages offered to the students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was great. Hostel facilities were up to the mark but were provided only for boys. Women's hostel was not far from the college but was not owned by the institute. The quality of the food served was a real concern there. There is a proper infirmary inside the college. The library is stacked with books and has a very pleasant ambience.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are good, but placements are not that good.

content.Placements: Around 30% of the students from our course were placed. The highest salary package offered was around 10 LPA, the minimum salary package offered was 2.75 LPA and the average salary package offered was around 4.0 LPA. Top recruiting companies that visited our college were Byju's, Wipro, Simplex Infrastructures, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is excellent, and the facilities provided are numerous. The library has many different collections of books and Wi-Fi facilities. Instruments in the labs are of all the latest versions and equipped with all the necessary instruments.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The college has good faculty members and good campus.

content.Placements: The college provides average placements. The highest salary package offered was 8 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 2 LPA. There is also a placement cell to help students. Many companies, like TCS, Netgear, Tech Mahindra, etc., have visited the college for recruitment. The average salary package offered is approximately 4 LPA to 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a good infrastructure. There is a big library which is good enough. It has the best environment for the students. Medical facilities are also available inside the campus. Classrooms are fine. You will not get any air conditioning in the classrooms. The computer lab is not so good, and there is no air conditioner in the computer labs also. The computers do not work properly sometimes.

reviews.review_heading: For learning in mechanical engineering this is one of the best private college in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average, I can say about my own mechanical department, if anybody want to study in mechanical engineering from any private institute in West Bengal, then my college is one of the best for study, professors are so helpful, very sincere for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied with the faculty, the extra curricular activities, the opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infra structure of college is really good. All the instruments, well developed labs are there. There is a very good library with all the books we need, magazines you want to read and with fast Wi-Fi. There is also a medical room if a student fall ill. There is also a games arena where u can play table tennis, pool, carrom and in the ground u can play cricket football. The college canteen is good the food they serve is of very good quality and price is also reasonable.

reviews.review_heading: If you want a job or the highest level knowledge, don't go to this college.
reviews.review_text: As far as the infrastructure is concerned, I would rate it 8/10. Labs, classrooms, library, ground, hostel, canteen are good. You will get almost all facilities over here. Since the college is 9 years old, equipment, labs, classrooms have all kinds of modern facilities. The hostel was very good when we were in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Only the college building better, infrastructure is like a hotel.
reviews.review_text: The college building and classroom infrastructure are very good. The quality of the playground is too much poor, and no free space on the college campus. The college doesn't have its hostel. The college road is too much poor in quality, and I see it last 7 years also the condition is same during my senior time.

reviews.review_heading: The best engineering college in North Bengal with the greatest level of infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, but obviously, more features are required. The library is world-class with the free Wi-Fi facility. Every classroom is modern and furnished. Our college has a nurse for the medical treatment. The faculty members rooms are beautifully situated. We have two game teachers for the extracurricular sports activities like table tennis, badminton, cricket, and football. We also have a big playground. The labs are complete with most of the instruments. In the college canteen, ...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good infrastructure and nice faculty.
reviews.review_text: There is good Wi-Fi facility. The library is big in the college. There is a common room for the students, where they can play indoor games. There is a medical room inside the campus. Quality of labs and classrooms are good. The quality of food in the canteen is average.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Technological Institute of Textile and Sciences offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and BBA. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Technological Institute of Textile and Sciences courses are offered to students in offline mode. Further, the fees structure for Technological Institute of Textile and Sciences courses stands around INR 1,67,500 to 4,88,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Technological Institute of Textile and Sciences is a good institution for M.E./M.Tech, B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Technological Institute of Textile and Sciences are Computer Science Engineering, Information Technology, Textile Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Technological Institute of Textile and Sciences?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is good, but students need to improve. They need to take it seriously.

review_content.Placements: Actually, the college used to bring companies for placements, but here students don’t participate, therefore the placement results are that much low. Skills are required, but most students don't have any skills for their placement, and that’s why the placement ratio is less. The highest package offered is around 20 LPA, and the lowest is around 3 LPA. Companies like Wipro usually visit our college. Internships are an issue for almost everyone in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every lab and library is provided with Wi-Fi facility and AC. The infrastructure is good, and in some areas, they are developing it. The mess is too good, they used to cook delicious food, and all facilities are available in the hostel. The canteen is not that much good here. The medical facilities are available right in front of our college, and we can get any medicine for free. Till now, there are no sports and games, but from this year, they are introducing many activities like sports meets. Many games are introduced and played every 15 days.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Textile Chemistry - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The most prestigious textile college of North India.

review_content.Placements: The top recruiting companies are Vardhman, Raymond, and Trident. The average number of students per class is not more than 40. Almost 90-95% of students are directly placed from the college at a 5-12 LPA package. The roles offered to the students mainly depend on their performance.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of ATIT College is not up to great standards, but yes, you get basic facilities in the college. The entire college campus is equipped with Wi-Fi. The main highlight of the college is its library, which I think is one of the most prestigious libraries, except for IITs.

individual_reviews.title: Decent infrastructure, mixed faculty experience, and outdated placement records.

content.Placements: In our college, the highest package is 12 LPA and this package is offered by two companies to our 8 to 10 students. High placement rates are seen in this campus. The lowest package is 3 LPA and the average is 7 LPA. From the 2nd year, students get their internships either from the college or outside the college.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is good. All classes and labs are digital, fully AC, and have free Wi-Fi which is easy to access with a unique password for each student. In labs, we work together and make practical projects. Rooms in the hostel are very comfortable, and food in the hostel mess is very delicious in the evening. We have a canteen also and a good medical facility.

admission_process.title: Technological Institute of Textile and Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Technological Institute of Textile and Sciences admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Technological Institute of Textile and Sciences considers scores in JEE Main, GATE, and CMAT for admission to specific courses.Technological Institute of Textile and Sciencesoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 3,25,060 - 4,88,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,67,500 - 1,87,710. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

description: Technological Institute of Textile and Sciences cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to the BTech program. The cutoffs are available in the form of ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates interested in taking admission at Technological Institute of Textile and Sciences can check out the sections below to view the exam, course, and category-wise cutoff details. A few more updates are below:

Technological Institute of Textile and Sciences cutoff 2025 was released via HSTES entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 832175 and 1234780 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 832175, B.Tech. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 822861.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General HS category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 832175.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General HS category.

The labs have Wi-Fi, but the speed is very slow. The hostel food is good, and the quality is satisfactory. The college also has its own dispensary.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Technological Institute of Textile and Sciences.
reviews.review_text: As college was built before independence, the maintenance of college is very bad. The college looks so old and demolished. There are no proper facilities in the canteen and very few rooms with air conditioning, and most of them are not working. The security guards are misbehaving.

reviews.review_heading: There is 100% Placement in 2021, 2022, and 2023. Infrastructure is Well and Good.
reviews.review_text: The college features well-maintained libraries and hostel rooms. The library offers Wi-Fi and AC facilities, and all classrooms are air-conditioned. The mess service is also very good. There are separate classrooms for each department, and all classes and libraries are equipped with AC.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. The infrastructure is average. Laboratories are very good. There is a garden on our campus. There is a decent library in this college. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The food quality is decent. Sports events are also organised in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good Placements in my department in 2023.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the college department are very good. Wi-Fi is available in our department with an average speed. Labs are well maintained and classrooms are also clean and air conditioned. Libraries are also in a very good condition with a lot of books available for studying and reading.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure. Smart boards and projectors are available in classrooms, which help students understand things much earlier compared to the traditional way of teaching. The quality of the food is good. Games are available. The mess is excellent. The quality of the food in the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Technological Institute of Textile and Sciences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and the hostel is average. It is old. The food in the hostel mess is very good. The diet plan and the infrastructure of the mess are good. They serve the food on time.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college because of its infrastructure, good faculty, and good placements.
reviews.review_text: There are many labs for computer engineering students and others. Cassrooms are big enough. The library facility is good. There are four hostel buildings for students. There is a huge ground for sports like cricket, football, kabaddi, and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Technological Institute of Textile and Sciences.
reviews.review_text: Our college has many labs for computer science students and others for other branches. Classrooms are too large with enough space for proper study. The library facilities at the Technological Institute of Textiles and Sciences are so good.

individual_reviews.title: College of Engineering, Trikaripur.

content.Placements: Around 30% of students who passed out got placed in different companies. The highest salary offered is Rs. 50,000 per month. Students get placed in the role of structural engineer, etc. The course offers internships in the last year of the course. You can take the offer if you want.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi. Libraries are useful. There are a lot of books to refer to for your subject. Classrooms are spacious enough to hold more than 50 students per class. The hostel offers good quality food. Extracurricular activities are supported greatly by the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Better campus, increased number of placements.

content.Placements: Placements have been increased since 2022. Till then, mostly tech companies approached for placements and filtered students with a cutoff CGPA. Companies that offer various skill-based jobs also come for recruiting. Mostly, 80 percent of the class gets placed. Most of them got placed from more than 2 companies.
content.Infrastructure: College has a wider campus and better infrastructure. An 11-a-side football ground, volleyball court, basketball court, badminton court—these are the outdoor sports facilities. As indoor games, there are chess, carrom, table tennis, etc. Wi-Fi facilities are available in all blocks.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of College of Engineering, Trikaripur.

content.Placements: Around 15 out of 40 students got placed in our college. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, TCA, Quest Global, etc. Quest Global and TCS recruited more ECE students. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus has a good library. All labs are good. Classrooms are average. Free Wi-Fi is not available in our college, and we have to use it by taking permission. There is no hostel for boys. The hostel facility is available for girls.
content.Faculty: All faculty members are good and have all subject skills. All of them are well-qualified and educated. Most of them are Ph.D. or PG holders in their respective subjects. They conduct two series of exams per semester. They conduct exams very strictly. The pass percentage is 51%.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a good placements, faculty and a good campus.

content.Placements: Our college is one of the best colleges in Kerala. The college does not have mechanical engineering, so fights on the campus are rare. The best thing about our college is the placements. Last year more than 100 people were placed. More than 30% of the placements were from big companies like TCS, Infosys, and Byjus.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus is as peaceful as it comes. The campus is long enough for a half-hour walk. There's no men's hostel available in the college, so boys have to find a hostel outside. But there is Ladies hostel though. The college gives enough freedom to the students, and the fee structure is affordable. We have all the lab facilities available. Most of our classes are smart classes. The food in the mess and canteen is pretty average. Sports are not quite popular in college, whereas arts day is the best time of the college. You could enjoy a lifetime during arts days. We have sports facilities like basketball, football, volleyball, badminton, table tennis, and kabbadi courts. Students prefer to study rather than sports, So if you are a sports fan better not come here. Our college has 8 college buses, so transportation for short distances is easy. The bus stop is 300m away from the college so you can just walk to the bus stop.

review_summary.college_name: D.A.V. Institute of Engineering and Technology, Medininagar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: According to me if you wanted to take admission in your local area.

content.Placements: According to my experience of this college approximately 10 students from 50 students got placed in a good package. The highest package should be 7 LPA. And the lowest is 3.5 LPA. And average is 4 LPA. Top recruits are infosys. But the main problem of this college was that the students do not get good percentage.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good, labs are also good, and infrastructure is approximately 44 acres of land. But the worst thing is that the college is not that much beautiful. I am from the computer Science department; its lab was old but you could use it. Not too many facilities regarding the campus were available; you couldn't find a canteen here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The experience of the chapter of my college life.

content.Placements: Placements are dependent on the basis of your skills, knowledge, and capability to deal with high pressure. During my time, the salary package offered was 2.5 LPA - 3.5 LPA. There were lots of companies that visited our campus. They judge you on the basis of your capability. In my time, the recruiting companies were Wipro, Java, and many more. About 55% of students got jobs and the rest moved toward their vision. The role offered depends upon the company.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, we had Wi-Fi in the library and labs full of specific equipment. The classrooms were equipped with air-conditioners and projectors. The library was clean and we can get every book in that library. The faculty of the library was also good. Their behavior was polite and they were always available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with myself at D.A.V. Institute of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: The highest package offered is 3 LPA. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month. Companies like Tech Mahindra, etc., visit the college to hire students. Principal sir is very good, and he always tries to bring companies for students who study on the campus of the D.A.V. Institute of Engineering.
content.Infrastructure: The library is good for studying. The hostel is also good for students who want to study in the college of D.A.V. Institute of Engineering and Technology, Medininagar. It is the best for studying. The hostel is not far from the college campus, so students can easily come there.

reviews_list.review_title: IT IS JUST LIKE OTHER PRIVATE COLLEGES with absolutely no quality of education n placement.

review_content.Placements: Placement is null from this college. There is no proper placement cell. Last year placement percentage was the worst. In this college you can earn only your degree and nothing neither education nor placement. And by chance any company came it will hire you on the minimum package 1 or 1.5 Lacs.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good as like other private college. It has nice buliding green campus with playground and a basketball court. But still construction is going on. Not good medical facilities, Wi-Fi network is very weak, Canteen has enough variety of fast foods. Overall you can not feel very much comfortable and pleasent in the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: The college timings are 9 am to 4 pm but the classes are irregular due to unavailability of faculty

review_content.Placements: I don't think that there are any placement faculty members present. It is very shocking that there is no training and placement department present in my college. I don't understand how AKTU gave them a licence for management courses. I am very disappointed about placements. My seniors are already searching jobs before completing MBA. This year, I thought of leaving this college, and take admission in any other good college.
review_content.Infrastructure: In the brochure of my college, lots of facilities are mentioned, but in reality, no facilities are present. Here students drink tank water. No Wi-Fi is available for students. The library is present, but the books which are available consists of a very old syllabus. individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placement 2018.

content.Placements: This college did not offer placements, and students need to learn and go outside to search the jobs. Only one interview was conducted for students, and the average salary offered is Rs 5,000 per month for 24 months.
content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi available for student only hostal and labs and classroom are available. As well as in college only one canteen is available which is not open on everyday. It's open occasionally such as exam time or any function. For games only basketball court was available but in poor condition.

content.Infrastructure: The college has a fantastic infrastructure. The campus is huge and spacious. It is spread over the area of 1.5 to 2 km. There are facilities like Wi-Fi, sports and modern labs. There are spacious and well-lit classrooms. The hostel rooms are well-lit and spacious.

The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the LDC Institute of Technical Studies BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 481517 and 1212143 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Electrical and Electron

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 481517 for the general AI quota.
On the contrary the least competitive specialisations for admission in 2024 were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and

LDC Institute of Technical Studies accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to LDC Institute of Technical Studies can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

LDC Institute of Technical Studies JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. For 2025, in the last round, the top three most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category students were B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering, followed by B.Tech. in Civil Engineering, and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, with the closing ranks of 2101195, 2116864 and 2117653, respectively.

hostel_campus.college_name: LDC Institute of Technical Studies Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
The College has a three storey hostel for boys in campus, amidst plush green lawns. The rooms are spacious, well lit and adequately equipped with furnitures, which makes the stay comfortable. The hostel has all modern day amenities like 100% power backup, in house telephone, internet services, sports & recreational facilities. It also includes a large dining hall and common room for audio visual entertainment and reading facilities. 

The girl's hostel is in the posh Civil Lines area of Allahabad with a view to the security and well being of the girl students. Free shuttle bus in deployed to ferry the students to the colleges.

library.description: The library offers students an excellent selection of books and magazines on all the branches of engineering, basic sciences, professional communication and management. It has more than 30,000 books & audio-visual learning resources. The center is digitized with computerized Issue & Return of books, computer-assisted search of learning resources and Open-Access System. It has facility for Internet and Del-Net. Library subscribes to about 100 National & International Journals.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Hockey, Volleyball, Table Tennis, Carrom

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placement 2018.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi available for student only hostal and labs and classroom are available. As well as in college only one canteen is available which is not open on everyday. It's open occasionally such as exam time or any function. For games only basketball court was available but in poor condition.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a good college compared to all the colleges in Allahabad.
reviews.review_text: The college has a fantastic infrastructure. The campus is huge and spacious. It is spread over the area of 1.5 to 2 km. There are facilities like Wi-Fi, sports and modern labs. There are spacious and well-lit classrooms. The hostel rooms are well-lit and spacious.

reviews.review_heading: IT IS JUST LIKE OTHER PRIVATE COLLEGES with absolutely no quality of education n placement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good as like other private college. It has nice buliding green campus with playground and a basketball court. But still construction is going on. Not good medical facilities, Wi-Fi network is very weak, Canteen has enough variety of fast foods. Overall you can not feel very much comfortable and pleasent in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college timings are 9 am to 4 pm but  the classes are irregular due to unavailability of faculty
reviews.review_text: In the brochure of my college, lots of facilities are mentioned, but in reality, no facilities are present. Here students drink tank water. No Wi-Fi is available for students. The library is present, but the books which are available consists of a very old syllabus. And old edition books (2007 edition) are issued for the students of MBA department. The building of the college is very big, and the college is spread in a very large area of land.

The college is very good, it has a nice atmosphere. The faculty members are all very well learned and teach well. The labs are good. The management doesn’t interfere much. Crowd is also great. Facilities are awesome. Love the hostel. Security is good for girls. All apparatus necessary for lab are present. The college is very good, it has a nice atmosphere. The faculty members are all very well learned and teach well. The labs are good. The management doesn’t interfere much. Crowd is also great. Facilities are awesome. Love the hostel. Security is good for girls. All apparatus necessary for lab are present.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in terms of education.
reviews.review_text: Our department is Wi-Fi enabled. Its speed is slow. We have good and well-maintained labs. Classrooms are very clean. Our department has a good library. The food served in the hostel is good. Our college has sports areas.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college, and it has a good atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: This college infrastructure was excellent. The campus was huge and spacious. It was spread over an area of 1.5 to 2 km. There were facilities like Wi-Fi, sports, and modern laboratories. There were spacious and well-lit classrooms. The hostel rooms were well-lit and spacious.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of the illegal things done to the students.
reviews.review_text: Labs are not good, and in the lab, systems are not working. Wi-Fi is available, but it is not working. Infrastructure is average, but the department is good. There is a library, but it does not have the latest books. I am not a hosteler.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members are knowledgeable and there are poor placements.

review_content.Placements: Only 2-3% of students get placed, and the maximum students do not get placed in our college. The highest package ranges from 4-5 LPA and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. Infosys company visits the college to hire students. Only 5% of students got internships. No more companies visit the college and select students.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi. Labs and classrooms are good. The library is good but small. The hostel facility is average. The food is poor. There are no sports and games. The canteen is not good.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful and very qualified. Their teaching techniques are very well. They are so humble with students and explain again and again. They do not make students much ready for industry. Semester exams are from medium to hard level. The pass percentage is 75%.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review by Khaiser Hussain.

review_content.Placements: The college in which I study I think it's fine for me. Because it's getting developed day by day. It is an autonomous college as well. So till my graduation, there might be more and more placement opportunities. I am not saying that there are no placements now but I am saying that there will be more and more opportunities. If you get a seat in this college please don't degrade the college instead you may join this college. This is what I wanted to say about my college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Campus is very big and has a solid infrastructure. No ragging in and outside of the campus. Here this college provides a bus facility for day scholars and hostel facility for non-local students. We have a library on our campus itself. Classrooms are good. We have one projector for each room.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. K.V. Subba Reddy Institute of Technology (KVSRIT) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty with their friendly nature, but we weren't satisfied with placements.

content.Placements: From our college, a few companies only came to recruit us, and some non-IT companies have placed some students. From IT companies, we just applied to companies, and we are waiting. After that, we got free coaching from some companies under the CSR drive.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good, but not excellent. The lab and library facilities are also available. Our faculty can support us in explaining content coming to the hostel, it is best, but we need to adjust with dinner, and apart from that, everything is good maintenance.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Only a few students get placed, around 10%, with packages of 4 to 5 LPA. Even then, very few get these jobs, mostly in other domains. No companies recruit specifically for our course. Around 30% of students get internship opportunities, mainly in customer support or human resources roles. Overall, the placements are not satisfactory for students.
content.Infrastructure: The course and department are not very professional. Wi-Fi is not good, and labs do not have enough systems. Teaching is not proper, making it difficult for career growth. The library does not have enough books. The overall infrastructure is poorly equipped. Canteen food is bad, there are no stationery or medical facilities, and sports and games are unavailable.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are knowledgeable and there are poor placements.

content.Placements: Only 2-3% of students get placed, and the maximum students do not get placed in our college. The highest package ranges from 4-5 LPA and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. Infosys company visits the college to hire students. Only 5% of students got internships. No more companies visit the college and select students.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi. Labs and classrooms are good. The library is good but small. The hostel facility is average. The food is poor. There are no sports and games. The canteen is not good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful and very qualified. Their teaching techniques are very well. They are so humble with students and explain again and again. They do not make students much ready for industry. Semester exams are from medium to hard level. The pass percentage is 75%.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review by Khaiser Hussain.

content.Placements: The college in which I study I think it's fine for me. Because it's getting developed day by day. It is an autonomous college as well. So till my graduation, there might be more and more placement opportunities. I am not saying that there are no placements now but I am saying that there will be more and more opportunities. If you get a seat in this college please don't degrade the college instead you may join this college. This is what I wanted to say about my college.
content.Infrastructure: Campus is very big and has a solid infrastructure. No ragging in and outside of the campus. Here this college provides a bus facility for day scholars and hostel facility for non-local students. We have a library on our campus itself. Classrooms are good. We have one projector for each room.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am not saying that I'm satisfied but it is okay to join and it has a green environment.

content.Placements: The placement for Diploma is none, but for B.Tech, it's pretty good. The teachers, all of them, are meant to be good to others, but the system they use to communicate with students is good, so I would probably say if you come from the middle class, it's good to join this college.
content.Infrastructure: It is pretty good, not likely to be like PG, and the infrastructure of this college looks suitable for honor and fame. There are good shady trees to discuss and to eat meals if you want a good amount of trees, and for those who travel from home, they have the facility to park their cars.

paragraphs: Dr. K.V. Subba Reddy Institute of Technology (KVSRIT) admission 2025 is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The institute considers scores in GATE, CAT, and AP EAMCET, etc. for admission. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in several specialisations.Dr. K.V. Subba Reddy Institute of Technology (KVSRIT)offers B.E. / B.Tech and UG Diploma at UG level and MBA/PGDM and MCA at the PG level.
Aspirants who are selected for admission need to pay the course fees. The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 1,82,800. Aspirants have to payINR 64,000 - 1,17,000for PG courses.

reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library facilities, and good infrastructure in my department at my college. In my hostel, quality food and mess, a canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are provided.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good environment.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has good rooms. The quality of the food in the mess is good. Our college provides good medical and sports facilities. We have good computer systems. Wi-Fi is available in our college. We have smart classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are excellent. Labs and the playground are good. There are big turbines and motors. There are a lot of instruments. Chemistry labs and physics labs are also good. Wi-Fi facilities in labs are also good. In boys' and girls' hostels, the food is good. The quality of the food in both hostels is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. K.V. Subba Reddy Institute of Technology (KVSRIT).
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities in our lab. We have many computers in our college lab. All programming languages and codes are available so as electronic components. Wi-Fi is available. The quality of the food is good and all facilities are provided at our college.

reviews.review_heading: By the joining this college, your life would be a turning point.
reviews.review_text: All facilities were available in the college. It was a good campus and mostly you like the environment. The hostel was sometimes good and sometimes poor. It is your choice for joining the hostel. The bus would be available on campus. Both girls' and boys' hostels were available. The food was also very nice sometimes. The playing ground was also available. There was a large space and benches were available in the classroom. The water facility was also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is absolutely fine with good faculty, and one can make good friends from different places.
reviews.review_text: Excellent infrastructure is available. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Decent classrooms are available, which can accommodate up to 80 students in a room. The practical labs and survey are impeccable. A digital library is available where we can learn peacefully. I'm not from the hostel, so I can't say anything about it.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college because of teachers, infrastructure and facilities, etc.
reviews.review_text: We have a good and decent infrastructure in our college, and the campus is WiFi enabled. We have a good infrastructure in the labs, and they are good at providing practical knowledge. We have decent classrooms which can accommodate 100 students in a class. Classrooms are provided with a projector step such that to provide visual knowledge. The college provides us with the digital library. As am not a hostler I don't know about the hostel facilities. But from my friend, I got to know that it's we...

reviews.review_heading: The campus is really good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in our college are good. Facilities like classrooms, labs and library maintenance were awesome. Quality of food served in the hostel was somewhat better. Medical facilities are available. Canteens are good, and sports and games are conducted properly.

reviews.review_heading: Finally, it's quite good college in our zone when compared to others.
reviews.review_text: Well-designed & topmost and branded systems are available ( Dell company products ). Hostels also nice and library maintenance is also good. Sports department is very good. All necessary things are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and placements. It is an enjoyable place.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good and big in the whole Kurnool. It has more than 2 playgrounds, one basketball ground, and swimming pool too. It has greeneries as well as good parking space in the college. The classrooms are big.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Bansal Institute of Research Technology and Science offers a wide range of programmes at UG level. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from stream such as Engineering. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech. Bansal Institute of Research Technology and Science fee structure ranges between INR 1,68,000 to 2,88,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Affordable education, strong faculty, and promising placements. BGI balances quality with value.

review_content.Placements: 60 to 70% of students are placed. Highest package is 57 LPA (likely from top-tier recruiters like Turning Minds). Average package is 5 to 10 LPA. Top recruiters are Capgemini, Wipro, Microsoft, TATA, Celebal, ApMoSys, and more. Around 80% of students secure internships. Popular roles are Software Developer, Business Analyst, Technical Consultant, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Campus facilities are Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, well-equipped labs, a digital library, sports facilities, and seminar halls. No dedicated hostel. Students typically stay in nearby Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana buildings. Use of signal jammers is reported in some areas. Mess & Canteen has basic facilities available, but quality may vary.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: College is very good and very sincere towards study facilities.

review_content.Placements: At least 70% of students get placed every year. The highest package to date is 45 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Companies like TCS, Microsoft, TISCO, Infosys, Wipro, and many more top recruiting companies visit every year. Internships are also provided from the second year for better experience.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-organized and systematic. All labs are also well-organized and contain all the required equipment. There is a library, and all necessary medical facilities are available for emergencies. Sports activities are also held at national and international levels.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.
faqs.question: Q: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?

faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.
faqs.question: Q: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?

faqs.answer: The BTech Civil Engineering syllabus focuses on both theoretical lectures as well as practical work.With the help of lectures in the curriculum, theoretical concepts are introduced to students, tutorials provide space for solving problems and applications also.And the labs offer hands-on experience to students who get acquainted with equipment and CAD software. Also, the field projects also allow students to apply their B Tech Civil Engg. skills and knowledge to design and implement communication systems.
faqs.question: Q: Does BTech Civil Engineering syllabus focus more on theory or practical application?

overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: Bansal Institute of Research Technology and Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This college is value for money.

content.Placements: Placements in Bansal Institute of Research Technology & Science have a good placement rate. Around 80–90 percent of students get placed through campus placements and grab a good package. The highest package is 42 LPA, and the average package is 4–5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Every lecture hall has a smart board, which makes studying easier. Labs are very good. Each class has its own Wi-Fi. There is no hostel on the college campus, and the hostel charges are also decent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Our college faculty members are very good and qualified.

content.Placements: In Bansal College, many students got placed at higher companies. Every year, 15 to 25 students are placed in the best companies. The maximum package offered is 35 LPA, and the minimum package offered is 1 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Linux, Zomato, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are clear. It has almost all facilities. Sometimes, there will be no electricity, but we can handle it. The library is good and it has almost all books that we want. Labs are good with very high-tech machines, and they provide full knowledge to us.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Affordable education, strong faculty, and promising placements. BGI balances quality with value.

content.Placements: 60 to 70% of students are placed. Highest package is 57 LPA (likely from top-tier recruiters like Turning Minds). Average package is 5 to 10 LPA. Top recruiters are Capgemini, Wipro, Microsoft, TATA, Celebal, ApMoSys, and more. Around 80% of students secure internships. Popular roles are Software Developer, Business Analyst, Technical Consultant, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Campus facilities are Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, well-equipped labs, a digital library, sports facilities, and seminar halls. No dedicated hostel. Students typically stay in nearby Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana buildings. Use of signal jammers is reported in some areas. Mess & Canteen has basic facilities available, but quality may vary.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is very good and very sincere towards study facilities.

content.Placements: At least 70% of students get placed every year. The highest package to date is 45 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Companies like TCS, Microsoft, TISCO, Infosys, Wipro, and many more top recruiting companies visit every year. Internships are also provided from the second year for better experience.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-organized and systematic. All labs are also well-organized and contain all the required equipment. There is a library, and all necessary medical facilities are available for emergencies. Sports activities are also held at national and international levels.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Bansal College makes our career bright.

content.Placements: Around 100 percent of students are getting placed in the computer science and engineering course. The highest package in this college is 42 LPA. The lowest is 3 LPA, and the average package is 6 LPA. The top recruiters in this college are TCS, Hexaware, Infosys, and Persistent Systems. Around 97% to 98% of students get internships. The top roles they offer are associate, software engineer, and cloud engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are very good in this college. They also provide Wi-Fi, and the classrooms are too good. Labs are so good, and all computers have very good configurations. The library is also good, with many books present. The quality of the mess is very good and hygienic, with so many food items available. The food is so good and healthy. Medical facilities are available 24/7. There are also many sports activities organized.

overview_faqs.question: Is IPS Group of Colleges a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: IPS Group of Colleges is a well-known institution for B.Ed, B.P.Ed, M.P.Ed, M.Ed, M.Pharma, D.Pharma, MBA/PGDM, B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, BCA, BBA, B.Com, B.Pharma courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, IPS Group of Colleges has a rating of 3.77 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.01 on Campus Life, 2.82 on Placements, 3.87 on Faculty and 4.36 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the IPS Group of Colleges?
overview_faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the IPS Group of Colleges is around INR 76000 - INR 280000.

overview_faqs.question: Why is IPS Group of Colleges so famous?
overview_faqs.answer: The name IPS Group of Colleges is synonymous with all round learning in management and technology and a household name for all practical-oriented learning in the state of Rajasthan. In the MBA, BBA, BCA, industry-oriented knowledge is given prominence through On Job Trainings and live projects. With its connection to IIM Ahmedabad and IIFT Delhi among others, its academic recognition also takes heights. With a good placement record, many graduates get jobs in top companies, besides being benefited from a strong alumni network. Besides these, its fee structure is also affordable and faculty experienced.

review_summary.college_name: IPS Group of Colleges Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied and everything was fine.

content.Placements: Percentage of students placed in my course was 80%. The highest package was 8 LPA, the lowest package was 3 LPA, and average package was 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies for my course were Amazon, Deloitte, etc. 85% of students got internships at Amazon, Cadbury, etc. Roles offered were team leader, HR, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, lab, library, presentation room, and all were in good condition. Students were taken there whenever it was mandatory. The quality of the facilities in my hostel was fantastic. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen was amazing. Medical facilities were also good. Sports facilities were great and games were good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Everyone should go to visit here.

content.Placements: Package around 7 LPA IT will offer. Minimum 50% was needed for placements. Roles offered were back-end developer, front-end developer, and AI and Java also. Internship percentage should be 40%. The highest package was 10 LPA. The lowest salary was 2.5 LPA. The average salary was 5 LPA. All things were good.
content.Infrastructure: Labs, library, Indore stadium, and everything were there. Mess food was awesome in taste. Indore stadium was one of the popular places in our college. Medical facilities were also there. Canteen food was also good, it was tasted with an affordable cost. All things were good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college and faculty members are good but I do not prefer it for placements.

content.Placements: Nowadays B.Com does not provide any kind of job opportunities at all. Still, one can choose B.Com if they are pursuing CA or any other kind of professional course that requires a competitive exam such as CAT for MBA for better universities like IIM and Delhi University.
content.Infrastructure: We have facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, good classrooms, and library. There is also a good faculty for sports. For sports, there is basketball court, badminton court, volleyball ground, cricket ground, swimming pool, table tennis, shooting, boxing, stream batch, and many more things.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely love the placement.

content.Placements: The college secures 100% placement every year. Companies like Deloitte, Wipro, PWC, Genpact, ICICI Bank, SBI Life, IDFC Bank, and many more come to recruit students from campus for placements. The placement season starts in the 5th semester, generally in September every year. There are many good offers and roles, mainly in finance, marketing, and HR. Profiles like tax consultant, business analyst, credit analyst, sales manager, territory manager, and business development executives are offered. For the batch 2018-20, there was 100% placement, and for 2019-21, placements are still ongoing.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Top level placement offers are made.

content.Placements: 80% of students were placed in my college and a 2 Lacs to 11 Lacs package was offered in my college. TCS, Deloitte, Axis Bank, and Cognizant are the top recruiters. 90% of students got internship and HR, Manager, Engineer, Software Developer, and Website Developer were the top roles offered in my college.
content.Infrastructure: There is a good library; all books are available in the college library. A good and clean environment, yummy and hygienic food are available in the canteen, medical facilities are provided and all types of outdoor games are available in my college .

admission_process.title: IPS Group of Colleges Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: IPS Group of Colleges admission 2025 is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The institute considers scores in JEE Main, GATE, and CMAT, etc. for admission. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in several specialisations.IPS Group of Collegesoffers B.P.Ed and B.Ed at UG level and M.P.Ed and M.Ed at the PG level.
Aspirants who are selected for admission need to pay the course fees. The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 76,000 - 2,20,000. Aspirants have to payINR 55,000 - 2,80,000for PG courses.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced
