description: IPS Group of Colleges cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the IPS Group of Colleges JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

IPS Group of Colleges cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 687262 and 1175918 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 687262, B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 999694.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General HS category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 687262.

hostel_campus.college_name: IPS Group of Colleges Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied and everything was fine.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, lab, library, presentation room, and all were in good condition. Students were taken there whenever it was mandatory. The quality of the facilities in my hostel was fantastic. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen was amazing. Medical facilities were also good. Sports facilities were great and games were good.

reviews.review_heading: Everyone should go to visit here.
reviews.review_text: Labs, library, Indore stadium, and everything were there. Mess food was awesome in taste. Indore stadium was one of the popular places in our college. Medical facilities were also there. Canteen food was also good, it was tasted with an affordable cost. All things were good.

reviews.review_heading: The college and faculty members are good but I do not prefer it for placements.
reviews.review_text: We have facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, good classrooms, and  library. There is also a good faculty for sports. For sports, there is basketball court, badminton court, volleyball ground, cricket ground, swimming pool, table tennis, shooting, boxing, stream batch, and many more things.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely love the placement.
reviews.review_text: The campus life is great. There are 18 different clubs and committees that students can join, which vary from the marketing club—Mercatus, finance club—Finacea, entrepreneurship club—Prarambh, operations club—Opuskriya, creativity club—Tassavur, analytics club—Insightix, and many more. Major fests of the college are PERIODOS and ACE CONNECT. The annual fest is IMPELZ, which is a two-day event where students from pan-India B-schools come and participate at the college. The library is known as LRC...

reviews.review_heading: Top level placement offers are made.
reviews.review_text: There is a good library; all books are available in the college library. A good and clean environment, yummy and hygienic food are available in the canteen, medical facilities are provided and all types of outdoor games are available in my college .

reviews.review_heading:
Good placements in year 2022 and 2023 
Satisfied faculty .
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi, Labs, Classrooms, and the Library are very good. The Canteen’s food is pretty good. Medical and Emergency facilities are also provided. 
The top indoor stadium of Gwalior for  games and sports is in our college. Two of the National players of outdoor and indoor games are from our College.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good for academics.
reviews.review_text: The location of our college is very good. We have separate labs for every subject. Pharmaceutics, HAP, Pharmaceutical Inorganic Chemistry, Pharmaceutical Analysis all have their labs, and our teachers are also very good. They are very intelligent and talented in their own course.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and good behavior by the faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good, with big playing grounds, a big basketball court, a good swimming pool area, a cricket ground, a hygienic and clean canteen with good food, a hostel and mess are also good, our college has very big libraries with proper seating arrangements, and computer labs are also good and spacious.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members.
reviews.review_text: I am a day scholar and have seen college in a proper way. It's something good but not very excellent. You will feel nice here. Garden in campus is so good. Hostel rooms are well constructed.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure and it provides good facilities.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi access in our college. It is only accessible at the hostel. Labs are good with air conditioning. The library is not good in the summer because there is no air conditioning. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is not good. Medical facilities are available. Sports, games, and NCC are at the next level in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and faculty are good but placements are bad.
reviews.review_text: There is a huge campus of my Institute and the infrastructure of my institute is too much good, there are 5 huge ground, gym, football ground, cricket ground, shooting, basketball, and building of institute is too much good, there are 6 computer labs,  24 classes, and too much huge library is present. Bad quality of food is available in mess and canteen. Medical facilities, sports facilities is too much good, as compared to other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Our college campus is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college has a massive ground, a huge indoor stadium, an open basketball court, a volleyball court, a tennis court, a boxing ring, and a swimming pool. All labs are well-maintained. Our library is full of books.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of facilities, labs, and sports facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good library as well as labs for all practical subjects. Our college has wi-fi connectivity but not for students, as well as well-kept classrooms that are neat and clean. Our college hostel is excellent, with high-quality food. We also have a good canteen facility. Our college has excellent sports facilities such as a sports field, courts, and so on.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the support of faculty members and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The library consists of every type of standard book for competitive examinations as well as books according to the syllabus for semester exams. A computer lab is also present. Around 100 students can sit in one class. Food quality is also good. Laboratories are well-equipped, and most of the machines are present. A pharma pilot plant is also available.

reviews.review_heading: College is good but not for core branches. If u want to choose another branch you can go for it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is A class. Sports facilities are also v good, the hostel is very good. The food available is also of good quality. But the canteen of the college is more or less just a shop with samosa fizz frooti bread pakoda. Not more. The cereal or Indian lunch that we have is not available there. Disappointed with canteen. Facilities are good enough water cooler drinking water clean toilets. The library is also very good with free Wi-Fi. And books are available in 5 daily ...

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews.review_heading: Teaching staff are really good with helpful attitude.

Also, games organised in the college play an important part for student's development.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied, but it's fair enough.

Our college building is of four floors, which is rectangular in shape when we see from the top. The classrooms and labs are comparatively big. The labs are highly advanced than other colleges in Satara. Also, the library of our college is huge. The sports and games aren't better than the other colleges, and it's only good enough. The Wi-Fi is not provided in our college. The canteen at our college is good eno...

reviews.review_heading: Known for the best placements and university rankers.

Mess is near to the college and it provides fresh food. The college has a big ground at one side to play games like cricket and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has great placement cell but few top companies visit our campus for placements. Our college also supports students by conducting company-specific training programs and recruitment drives to train students in various MNCs. Our college also provides many opportunities for placements and internships.

review_content.Other: Known for its beautiful infrastructure and quality educational services, OPJS University has started gaining appreciation from students, reviewers and other educational institutions. OPJS University has a widespread campus of 32 acres near Arvali Hills comprising of the main building, libraries, laboratories, hostels and residences for teachers and students. The design of the building is constructed in such a way that it consumes less energy and save more of it. There are ample facilities provided to the students of OPJS University such as transport, research, residencies, Wi-Fi inability, a big updated library etc. Each classroom has the capacity to accommodate 150 students and modern education facilities to ensure efficient learning. OPJS University was built in 2013 under the Act 16 of 2013 in the city of Churu in Rajasthan. The city is well connected to all the important cities of the state. The promulgation event of OPJS University was carried out in the presence of the honorable governor of the state. Students can apply for any of the educational programs for the wide variety of programs provided by the OPJS University in different streams. There are a number of undergraduate programs, special diploma programs, postgraduate programs and PhD programs available. Under the category of School of Education and Physical Education, it offers courses as follow- 1. M.A. 2. B.Ed./B.A./B.Sc.B.Ed. 3. B.P.Ed. 4. D.P.Ed. 5. B.EI.Ed. 6. D.EI.Ed. 7. B.P.E. 8. M.P.E. 9. D.P.S.E. Diploma in Preschool Education (D.P.S.E.) is available in OPJS University as a full time course of 2 years comprising of 4 semesters. The minimum eligibility required for D.P.S.E. is an HSC. The prescribed fees for D.P.S.E per year are Rs.25, 000 only. The students will have to pay Rs.1000 as exam fees for every semester.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Agriculture - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Good university for Haryana and Rajasthan.

content.Placements: Placements are not available for this university. I think, soon it will be possible. This university is new and having a great start in sport and agriculture filed. The pharmacy department was also added in 2015. I have the great experience at this university, and I have like it.
content.Infrastructure: After the renovation, it's looking awesome. The new colour and the second floor of the boy's hostel. Free Wi-Fi is available in the university campus for all students. The library consists of all the useful books of my section. We always want to play volleyball on the sports ground.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Hotel Management - Batch of 2014

content.Other: Known for its beautiful infrastructure and quality educational services, OPJS University has started gaining appreciation from students, reviewers and other educational institutions. OPJS University has a widespread campus of 32 acres near Arvali Hills comprising of the main building, libraries, laboratories, hostels and residences for teachers and students. The design of the building is constructed in such a way that it consumes less energy and save more of it. There are ample facilities provided to the students of OPJS University such as transport, research, residencies, Wi-Fi inability, a big updated library etc. Each classroom has the capacity to accommodate 150 students and modern education facilities to ensure efficient learning. OPJS University was built in 2013 under the Act 16 of 2013 in the city of Churu in Rajasthan. The city is well connected to all the important cities of the state. The promulgation event of OPJS University was carried out in the presence of the honorable governor of the state. Students can apply for any of the educational programs for the wide variety of programs provided by the OPJS University in different streams. There are a number of undergraduate programs, special diploma programs, postgraduate programs and PhD programs available. Under the category of School of Education and Physical Education, it offers courses as follow- 1. M.A. 2. B.Ed./B.A./B.Sc.B.Ed. 3. B.P.Ed. 4. D.P.Ed. 5. B.EI.Ed. 6. D.EI.Ed. 7. B.P.E. 8. M.P.E. 9. D.P.S.E. Diploma in Preschool Education (D.P.S.E.) is available in OPJS University as a full time course of 2 years comprising of 4 semesters. The minimum eligibility required for D.P.S.E. is an HSC. The prescribed fees for D.P.S.E per year are Rs.25, 000 only. The students will have to pay Rs.1000 as exam fees for every semester.

admission_process.title: OPJS University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: OPJS University admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The university conducts entrance exams for admission to courses such as PhD, MPhil, B.Ed and law courses. Selection for all other programmes is based on merit in the last qualifying exam.OPJS Universityoffers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in multiple streams such as Management, Commerce, Engineering, etc. through 12 schools. Interested candidates can apply online for their preferred course.
OPJS University admissions are currently open. Candidates can apply for UG, PG or doctoral courses in regular mode. Below are the key admission highlights for OPJS:

OPJS University admissions are primarily based on the merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. For some of the courses, the selection is based on university-level entrance exam. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Below is the eligibility and selection criteria for topOPJS University courses:

OPJS University fee breakup includes multiple components such as tuition fee, registration, exam, etc. Students are required to pay tuition fee semester-wise or annually. Candidates are required to pay course fee after completion of the selection rounds to confirm their seat. Below is theOPJS University feefor popular courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

OPJS University offers admission to most of the courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The university opens applications online on the official website of the university. Below is the step-wiseOPJS University admission process:
STEP 1: OPJS University Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online for all courses. Candidates need to fill out the application form along with the specified documents. Aspirants meeting the eligibility criteria also need to pay a non-refundable application fee.
STEP 2: Selection

OPJS University selects candidates for admission based on the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam i.e. Class 12 for UG and graduation for PG courses. The university conducts an entrance exam for B.Ed, MPhil, PhD and law courses. OPJS accepts CUET score for admission to most of the UG courses.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

Once the selection process is over and the entrance exam results are out, the university releases a merit list. The university might call the aspirants for document verification. Selected candidates need to confirm their seat by paying the course fee.

hostel_campus.college_name: OPJS University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: University has well furnished hostel rooms with an almirah, table, chair and a cot, water heater for both boys and girls. Water cooler with purifier are provided in the hostels.  Both hostels have common rooms with Television and indoor games facility and a dinning hall is also provided to the hostellers. The rooms are available in the form of Single Bedded Cubicle, Double Bedded and Triple Bedded.

library.description: The university has 2 storied central library which comprises of 30,000 books that covers all the faculties being taught in OPJS. It has subscribed to various national and international journals. The e-library has an access for reference to latest publications of the research journals / materials and information through 200 computers connected through LAN.In addition to this university also has a vast digital library. The library is well ventilated.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell is not good enough. They are not providing enough information about the placements. Placement cell is not providing any guidance. Even we don't know about the placement officer yet, and they are not accessible to us. It is not good enough.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are not enough helpful. Most of the computers are not working properly. There are not enough properties in the labs. There is no lab technician in the labs. Lab resources are less useful to us due to lacking in instruments.

review_content.Infrastructure: The college is a developing college founded three to four years back. The classrooms and labs are in good condition. There is a canteen in the campus. All the necessary facilities are there.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers and staff are good and helpful. They always supported students in their studies. The course is relevant and the exams are slightly tough. The exams are in semester manner. Regular internship and industrial visit are provided during the second year.

content.Placements: In my course, 100 students in my class, the highest package offered is 50000, while the lowest is 22000. The top recruiting companies include MRF, CEAT, Apollo, and many more. fees_and_eligibility.overview: University College of Engineering, Villupuram, Anna University offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time and Part Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, University College of Engineering, Villupuram, Anna University offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech. University College of Engineering, Villupuram, Anna University fee structure for all the courses is around INR 48,000 to 50,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    University College of Engineering, Villupuram, Anna University has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider University College of Engineering, Villupuram, Anna University as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: University College of Engineering, Villupuram, Anna University is a well-known institution for B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, University College of Engineering, Villupuram, Anna University has a rating of 4 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.8 on campuslife, 3.3 on placements, 4.3 on faculty and 3.9 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: University College of Engineering, Villupuram Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good placement training for placing in companies.

content.Placements: In our course, nearly 40-70% of students were placed each year, even last year 2022 Batch, 176 students are placed in various companies. Top companies like TCS, Infosys and Wipro were taken many students. The packages are from 2 - 5 lack per annum. The major roles are Software engineer, Software designer, Testing engineer and so on.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are quite good compared to other colleges. The Wi-Fi may be slow for a long while but it is good. Classrooms are so good and huge, The library is also good enough with all the books. Coming to the hostel and mess, the food is quite good, we can't complaint the quality because everything was double checked. Hostel is so good with rooms and water and electricity are always provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: There are many top recruiting companies that visit our college to hire students. The maximum salary package offered is 4.5 LPA, and the minimum salary package offered is 1.5 LPA. SureSoft and Jileba are the top recruiting companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus has a free Wi-Fi facility. Our college has laboratories for mechanical, ECE, CSE, and IT branches. It also provides a huge library. Sports like cricket, volleyball, kabaddi, tennis, badminton, and basketball are available. Teachers have separate bike stands.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Courses are offered at low cost.

content.Placements: Placements are good only for CSE and IT. Other departments suffer in terms of job. Buddy, TCS, Burning glass, Infosys and some more companies are available for placements. Internships getting students are really low. You may get a package from 2 to 8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and decent hostel. Wi-Fi is available at certain places. Classrooms are neat and library is sufficient. There is no extra canteen inside the college. Only hostel canteen is available. Sports and games are as per our interest.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with studying at our college.

content.Placements: There are a lot of companies offering good jobs. The maximum salary package offered is 4.5 LPA and the minimum is 1.5 LPA. Previous year, more than 80% of students got placed at good companies. Overall, our college has good placement records.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has the perfect infrastructure with a lot of classrooms, laboratories, restrooms, conference halls, and exam cells. Each department has separate classrooms. The library facility is amazing. There is a digital library. Wi-Fi is also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty and their teaching.

content.Placements: There is a placement cell in our college, but they didn't give placement training and aptitude tests. They provide placements for 20 out of 500 students.
content.Infrastructure: It's been 13 years since the bathroom conditions were bad. Food is wasted.
content.Faculty: Teachers are well trained and all have got their PhDs from reputed institutions. They explain the lessons very deeply.
content.Other: The college is outside of the city. There are no transportation facilities.

faqs.question: How can I get into University College of Engineering, Villupuram, Anna University for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
University College of Engineering, Villupuram, Anna University has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past fiv

overview_faqs.question: Why choose Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur?
overview_faqs.answer: Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur is a private college and was established in 2008. Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur Campus courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with the Engineering stream and offers courses in several departments, such as Nursing, Management, Pharmacy, Law, Education, etc. The college has been accredited by eminent bodies such as the AICTE and the INC. Further, the college guarantees placement assistance to students and offers job opportunities in renowned brands. Some of the top recruiters at Rayat Bahra Punjab are Nestle, Persistent, Wipro, Roya Enfield, John Deere, Godrej, etc.

review_summary.college_name: Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My college is very good for students. I'm very glad to take admission in this college.

content.Placements: My course B.Tech IT has a scope and it is a nice course. Many companies visit to hire students for placements and the packages offered are high. College deals with many companies for placements for students and college is good for students.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are very good. They are neat and clean. Campus is very good. College environment is very peaceful. The quality of facilities is excellent. Hostel is very good. There are 5 canteen, stationery shops, etc., available. There are sports and games facilities available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: In 2025, more and better placements, students work harder.

content.Placements: 50% of students in this course. The companies came to the college for interviews, and many students were doing jobs. Good income sources, many companies like students' work, good experience. Many parents of students got excellent internships and they earned.
content.Infrastructure: All kinds of facilities, the classrooms are also good, Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, library are always excellent, all facilities available in each lab, the hostel is also good and the food and drinks are also very good. Sports are always excellent. Enjoy more.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The very good facility in college and good environment.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is a maximum of 75% or above, and placements are very good. The highest package is 15 Lacs, and the lowest is 3 Lacs. Very good companies select the students, offering internships and good salaries. It's a very well-regarded college.
content.Infrastructure: The college facilities are good, and the staff behave well with students. Wi-Fi is good and provides a proper connection. The classrooms are decent, but the fans are slow, and there is no AC in the classrooms. The library fans are also slow. The hostel facilities are bad, but sports are better.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Rayat Bahra, Hoshiarpur Campus.

content.Placements: Placements are available in our college. You can opt for off-campus placements. Companies visit our college for internships in the third semester.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. It is spread over many acres of land. Our college has a ground and a huge canteen. The campus is highly hygienic and neat. The parking facility is available on campus.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are very qualified. They teach very interesting topics in every class. They are postgraduates and Ph.D. holders. They are very understanding and help us to understand things well. The principle is very good and understanding.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides very good placements.

content.Placements: Around 80% of our batch students get placed in software companies with the highest salary package of 10 LPA. The lowest salary package is 3.37 LPA offered by TCS and the average salary package is 5 LPA. Top recruiters companies are Wipro, Bebo Technologies, Cloud Analogy, Teachnook, and All E Technologies. The roles offered are trainee developer, database developer, and software tester.
content.Infrastructure: Lab facilities are not much good. The quality of labs is improved.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are helpful and qualified with good degrees. They teach from depth but the course curriculum is bad. Passing semester exams is difficult.

admission_process.title: Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur admission 2025is ongoing, candidates can participate in the merit-based admission process to secure a seat at various UG and PG courses. The courses are offered to both domestic and international candidates in a full-time/regular mode.Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpuroffers courses in the fields of Commerce, Engineering, Science, and Law. The application process is online and is available on the official website of the group of institutes. Learn more about Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur and the courses it offers through the information below.

Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur Campus applications are ongoing for the academic session 2025-26. Candidates seeking admission can register directly through the group of institute's official website. There are more than 10 courses with various specialisations. The group of institutes offers courses in Engineering, Law, Science and other streams. Check out the highlights table below to learn more aboutRayat Bahra Hoshiarpur courses:

Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur Campus offers more than 10 courses at the UG and PG course levels to students across the fields of Law, Science, and Engineering.Rayat Bahra admission 2025to the courses is based on a merit-based process. Check out all the popular courses along with their selection & eligibility criteria in the table below:

As per the details available online on the website of Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur, the group of institutes follows a merit-based admission process for all the courses. Candidates are required to create an account with a strong password and fill out the application form. TheRayat Bahra Hoshiarpur admission processis a multi-step process inclusive of application, selection rounds, document verification, payment of fee, and seat allotment. A step-by-step process that candidates must follow is as follows:
STEP 1: Rayat Bahra Application Process 2025

The application form for admission to various courses is available on the official website, Candidates are required to create an account with a strong password to access the application form. Accurate details of academics and work experience should be put on the application form. Candidates receive a confirmation once the fee payment is made for the application form.
STEP 2: Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur Shortlist Release and Final Offer

Candidates are shortlisted based on the information mentioned on the application form. Candidates who make it to the final shortlist and receive the final offer are required to pay the course fee and secure their seat.
STEP 3: Rayat Bahra Document Verification & Payment of Admission Fee

Candidates must be available with the list of documents to facilitate a smooth admission process. However, the fee payment must be done online through the means mentioned. Candidates can learn more aboutRayat Bahra Hoshiarpur feestructure and payment process through the official website of the group of institutes.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Rayat Bahra University Hoshiarpur?
faqs.answer: Getting into Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur depends upon various factors such as meeting the minimum eligibility criteria and performance of candidates in the selection rounds conducted by the group of institutes. If candidates meet the eligibility criteria, it is possible to get admission directly. The admission process is merit-based and candidates can participate in the admission process by filling out the application form.

faqs.question: What are the selection criteria for admission to Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to the courses offered by Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur must meet the eligibility criteria and follow the selection criteria to get shortlisted. The eligibility criteria for the courses on offer depend on factors such as the course level. For UG courses candidates are generally required to have a minimum of 45% aggregate. Candidates can fill out the appliation form online or offline to inititate the admission process.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur?
faqs.answer: Yes, Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur Campus accepts direct admissions for the courses. Candidates wishing to get admission in the Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur Campus must meet the eligibility and selection criteria. Rayat Bahra follows a merit-based admission process to shortlist the candidates for the various UG and PG programmes. Candidates who do get shortlisted are required to pay the tuition and hostel fee to confirm their admission to the course.

faqs.question: How can I apply for Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur?
faqs.answer: The Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur application process for various courses is ongoing, and candidates can access the same on the official website of the group of institutes. Candidates must create their login ID with a strong password to fill out the application on the official website. Candidates must follow the following steps for the online application:Step 1:Visit the official website and click on the 'Admission' section, and then select the "Apply Now 2025" section to open the application form.Step 2:Create a login ID with a strong password.Step 3:Fill out the form with accurate academic and work experience details.Step 4:Pay the application form fee and get the confirmation once the payment is done successfully.Step 5:Candidates can download the application form to keep for future reference.

review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities of the academic building are better than those of other government engineering colleges in Bihar. The average Wi-Fi speed is decent but is expected to improve within two months. The college features big, clean classrooms and washrooms, along with a well-equipped central library with AC facilities. All labs for different branches are available. The mess food quality is very good, and a canteen is also available. Additionally, there are medical facilities and a large sports ground accommodating various games, including both outdoor and indoor sports. The college hosts an annual fest where students participate in sports like cricket, chess, badminton, volleyball, kabaddi, carrom, as well as reel and short movie competitions and science presentations. Cultural programs are also celebrated.

content.Placements: My college is situated in Phulpura Vaishali. There are different types of courses offered by college like B.Teach in electrical, civil, mechanical, computer Science, iot, electronics and communication. Frankly speaking the placement ratio is not too high of the college but the companies came here and choose the write candidate through proper selection process, till now the maximum package allot was 12,13 Lacs per annum and average package is 4 to 5 Lacs per annum. For the internship opportunities the college never said no to any such things the faculty and management always pushes students for there best decision there is a proper method of applying to it you have to consult with principle and brief your internship programme then he gave you a NOC and you are free to take offline or online internship through any good platform.

review_summary.college_name: Shreemati Nathibai Damodar Thackersey Women's University, ChurchGate Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of CSJM - Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University.

content.Placements: Placement rate in our course is average, and it is around 55 percent. The average package offered ranges from 3-4 LPA mostly. Recruiting companies that visit our college are mostly mass recruiters like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, etc. The top role offered is a junior developer.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is quite good. It has AC classrooms and a big central library with a huge collection of books. Wi-Fi facility is available. The hostel's condition is decent and needs some renovation. The mess food is average. All medical facilities are provided by the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College: more than just a degree.

content.Placements: Approximately 80 to 90 percent students are placed in this college. This college provide placement in various field like LL.B., LL.M., B. Tech, BCA, BBA, MBA etc. The highest package of university is approximately 12.5 LPA and average around 3.5 LPA. Several companies come here to recruit the students fresher and the top companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys etc. My college also provide internship to a student; approximately 80 percent student gets internship from here to work dedicated involved in it. The companies hire roles like software engineer, database engineer, and sales manager etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A good college worth joining.

content.Placements: A good percentage of students get placed in the college campus, and the highest package offered is 6 LPA, while the lowest package offered is between 3 LPA and 4 LPA. Many companies visit the campus, and a few students get internship opportunities based on their skills and grades. Various roles are offered to them.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is equipped with CCTV cameras everywhere and labs with computers and good Wi-Fi, as well as air conditioners. The library consists of a variety of books for almost every subject required in the course. The hostels are average or above average, the quality of food is good, and the rooms are of good infrastructure. There are grounds and other indoor games equipment available as well for the students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A worthy college for students.

content.Placements: A good percentage of students get placed on the college campus, approximately 70-80 percent. The highest and the lowest package offered varied in the range of 3 LPA-4 LPA. Recruiting companies include HCL, TCS, etc. A few students get internships from the college, and many important positions are available in companies for the students.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are good and have modern infrastructure with good quality water. Wi-Fi, 24,7 electricity, the quality of food is also top-notch, and the sports facilities are adequate with an Olympic-size pool and cricket ground, etc. Libraries are modern. Classrooms with Wi-Fi everywhere in the labs.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: My review of this college.

content.Placements: The college placement cell is very up-to-date and very active. They know everything about the latest trends and understand what skills are required in the industry, and a student must possess those skills. Many companies came to our college and selected many students, and took results and checked. Later, they took interviews and many of them got selected by many companies. Many of them are on the waiting list to get placed in the top leading companies. Companies like TCS, Wipro, HCL, etc., come every year to hire the best students with high packages.

hostel.description: University Hostel Located in the lush green campuses of the University, SNDT Women’s University Hostel is a home away from home for girls who come to pursue their dreams in the congested and fast life of Mumbai. It’s a huge building with 4 floors and comprising over 150 rooms which accommodate more than 500 students. Mess facility is provided within the building itself.

library.description:
The collection includes books and monographs, Journals, newspapers, back volumes of Indian & foreign journals Back runs of newspapers and women’s magazines, State-of –the art reviews, databases,
Dissertations and theses, Standards and specifications, Reprints of articles & newspaper clippings,Pamphlets, leaflets and brochures, Annual reports of Governments agencies & research institutes, Unique collection of Hindustani Music, Select collection of teaching aids audio-visual material, microforms, Electronic resources including e-books, e-journals.
The collection of the Central Library is particularly strong in the social sciences, Gandhiana, women’s studies, arts, literature, nursing, education and library & information science. It provides Special workstations for using audio-visual materials, CD-ROMs and internet, Extensive lending facilities and Inter-library loan facilities. Library has membership of various e-resources such as Cambridge University Press, Emerald (LIS Collection), JCCC, JSTOR and many more.

Electronic Services:

SULOC, the online catalogue, is a key to the resource of the entire library system.
CD-ROMs of reference materials, learning resources, bibliographic sources and full text journals make searching information a quick and easy task.
Internet searching facility with professional help opens a gateway to global resources.
A growing number of downloaded internet resources, in-house papers etc. organized into an Electronic Library.
A database of web sites helps locate useful and relevant resources on the internet.
An in-house online index to language and literature‘Sahitya Suchi’
Access to databases like ‘Proquest’ , ‘EBSCO’, Indiastats.
Access to databases offered by inflibnet like JSTOR, Emerald(Library Science), JCC (JSTOR Custom Content for consortium), Cambridge journals etc.
Access to IEL online, IEEE and other databases as provided by INDEST consortia.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by CSJM - Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj UniversityReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Review of CSJM - Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is quite good. It has AC classrooms and a big central library with a huge collection of books. Wi-Fi facility is available. The hostel's condition is decent and needs some renovation. The mess food is average. All medical facilities are provided by the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by CSJM - Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj UniversityReviewed on 27 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College: more than just a degree.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is so good. They provides Wi-Fi within full campus. The Hi-Tech labs and classrooms are very good; they have smart board. Here are two specific libraries like one is central library for all students and one is departmental library for department students. CSJM also have a cafeteria included sport and they have also a stadium in it.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by CSJM - Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj UniversityReviewed on 23 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A good college worth joining.
reviews.review_text: The campus is equipped with CCTV cameras everywhere and labs with computers and good Wi-Fi, as well as air conditioners. The library consists of a variety of books for almost every subject required in the course. The hostels are average or above average, the quality of food is good, and the rooms are of good infrastructure. There are grounds and other indoor games equipment available as well for the students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by CSJM - Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj UniversityReviewed on 8 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A worthy college for students.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good and have modern infrastructure with good quality water. Wi-Fi, 24,7 electricity, the quality of food is also top-notch, and the sports facilities are adequate with an Olympic-size pool and cricket ground, etc. Libraries are modern. Classrooms with Wi-Fi everywhere in the labs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by CSJM - Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj UniversityReviewed on 5 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is good and hygienic. The food is available in a mess. Rooms are available with single and double sharing options. Charges are familiar. There is a 24-hour water supply in the hostel. Labs are also there where we practice the practical part of courses.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by CSJM - Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj UniversityReviewed on 2 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is like a startup and not a college. 80 percent of students get placed.
reviews.review_text: With its cutting-edge labs, fast Wi-Fi, and air-conditioned classrooms, the infrastructure feels more like a startup office. Hostels are basically flats. The mess food is not good, but we will survive, so definitely students order out. There are only indoor games and a gym instead of large sports facilities. The setup here is good for coding.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by CSJM - Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj UniversityReviewed on 3 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My Review of CSJM - Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University.
reviews.review_text: The computer application course was very interesting. The course has various computer programming languages like C, C++, Java, HTML, etc. The computer lab was good. It allows students to understand these concepts on their own. The course had a good balance between theoretical and practical work. We even had the chance to get in research projects. The hostels were well-organized and maintained by the authorities. Toilets were hygienic. The rooms were spacious. Students were provided with a bed, a...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by CSJM - Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj UniversityReviewed on 19 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with it because of the good faculty members. Most importantly, good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like free Wi-Fi, fully AC classrooms, many libraries, and good infrastructure were available in my course. The quality of facilities in my hostel was excellent. It was totally hygienic food, well-cleaned rooms with AC, and a playground for games and sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Sadabai Raisoni Women's College, NagpurReviewed on 3 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty support and decent placement with scope for more industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: Spacious and well-ventilated classrooms. Dedicated computer lab with good internet connectivity. Campus Wi-Fi is available for students. Well-stocked library for students, other facilities, food canteens, Medical facilities, sports and games facilities, cleanliness & maintenance.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by CSJM - Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj UniversityReviewed on 18 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: There is separate accommodation for boys and girls. With time passing by, the hostel management has been very particular about the rules and regulations, and the mess food was very good and hygienic.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sadabai Raisoni Women's College, NagpurReviewed on 31 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of 2025 placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent, with well-maintained classrooms, a library, computer labs, and seminar halls. Wi-Fi is available in most areas of the campus. College also focuses on extracurricular activities, workshops, and seminars which help students grow in various dimensions.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by CSJM - Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj UniversityReviewed on 29 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is good Hod sir is good Labs are perfectTeachers are good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Free Wi-Fi is available in all the buildings. Classrooms are also good. Labs are good. The hostel is good, but it is too far; it is too distant. The ground is so big that every student is allowed to go there to play different games as they want.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sadabai Raisoni Women's College, NagpurReviewed on 19 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My honest review of college.
reviews.review_text: The college girl stated that it used to have a hostel in the college premises, but now that hostel building has been transformed into an administrative block, for now. There are no facilities like a hostel. But there is a college canteen inside the college premises.  Books are available in the library, no need to purchase, can issue books from the library through the Library ID-card.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sadabai Raisoni Women's College, NagpurReviewed on 4 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has affordable courses with helpful teachers and practical learning.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is quite good. We have well-equipped computer labs with high-speed internet, smart classrooms, and a decent library with relevant books and journals. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The hostel facilities are average, with clean rooms and basic amenities. The quality of food in the mess is satisfactory, though it can be improved. The campus has a medical room. It also encourages sports with a separate playground and indoor game areas.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by CSJM - Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj UniversityReviewed on 4 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best campus of Kanpur in affordable price.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of my course is really very great. All classes are well furnished and also have proper water, sanitation, and other facilities. In our computer lab, there are enough amount of computers. All the labs, auditorium, and main department offices have AC but not in all the classrooms. Full campus is connected with Wi-Fi but sometimes its speed is slow. Campus has proper medical facilities with sports/games along with cafeteria.

college_info.college_name: Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview: Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology is a private institute, established in 2002 in Krishna, Andhra Pradesh. Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology is approved by AICTE and offers a total of 22 courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in 9 specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering and Electronics Engineering. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA and After 10th Diploma in Full Time mode. Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 70,000 to 1,98,000. Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology has an annual seat intake of 1896 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. As per the recent Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology placement records, the average median salary at the Institute is around INR 3,70,000. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

faqs.answer: A:    The fees range for courses offerred by the Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology is around INR 54000 - INR 198000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: This college's infrastructure is good.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of the students is placed from the B.Tech, with a percentage of 75%, intermediate with 70 percent, and 10th with 65 percent. Top recruiting companies are HCL, Infosys, Deloitte, Accenture, and Sutherland. Internship is offered by the AICTE, Open Weave, and ICT Academy.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi are placed at branch department. Labs are good to practice with good labs incharge. Classrooms are good and have good ventilation. In hostels, there would be two different hostels for boys and girls separately, with a hostel warden, and also provide good food for the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with our HOD sir, faculty, and good placement.

review_content.Placements: 75% of students get placed every year. The highest package is 20 LPA, and the lowest package is 4.5 LPA. 60% of students got internships every year. Recruiting companies are Wipro and many more. All are provided by our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our facilities and infrastructure are nice. I am from CSE. The sports are conducted very well. Canteen food is so nice to eat. Mess is so nice. There is a medical room which is used by students when they are sick.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: My college memories will last forever.

review_content.Placements: There are good placements in the college in companies like Infosys, Tech Mahindra, etc. The college also invited Sutherland, and I got selected for Sutherland. It has very good P&T department in college, and they will help students well. Placements are good here.
review_content.Infrastructure: My department is well-furnished. It has great lab facilities. All systems are Wi-Fi connected, and the Wi-Fi speed is very fast. Labs are too good. We have a huge library to refer to with a great collection of books. We have everything in the college, as I am a day scholar. I do not know about the hostel, but my friends stay in the hostel. They said they have very good food and great beds.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It has a good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 70-80% of students got placed. The highest package is 25 LPA. Least package is 7 LPA, and the placement training is good. They conduct classes for placement assistance. The way of conducting the placement classes is also good so I advise joining.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure, playground, hostel, canteen, and bus facilities. All are good classes and washrooms are also maintained neatly. They provide libraries for gaining extra knowledge. It has extracurricular activities like programs, events, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placed in our college is 70%. The average package offered is more than 6 LPA in the college. The lowest package is 3 LPA and the highest package is 10 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are Tata Consultancy Services, Wipro, and IBM.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilites and infrastructure are awesome. My course is AI ML which is artificial intelligence and machine learning. The college provides good labs and classrooms for study. The library has more books than our curriculum. Hostel facilities are also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with our college's maximum number of equipment and placements.

review_content.Placements: 95% of students got placed in our MIC College which is yearly maintained. There is no certain package offered to students as they are not interested and they need to continue their B.Tech education to achieve some higher degree and settle in a well position. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, Infosys, IBM, RED HAT, etc., and also 90% of students got internships every year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college facilities are very good compared to the other colleges which are nearer. They provide Wi-Fi and computer labs for computer engineering students and electronic labs for electrical students and also in your free time you can access and use the library. Coming to the hostel, the facilities are also good. Food is neat and clean and tasteful and canteen is maintained very well. Medical facilities are only provided to the hostel students and sports are also given priority.

overview_faqs.question: Is Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, UG Diploma, MBA/PGDM, MCA, After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology has a rating of 4.04 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.24 on Campus Life, 3.5 on Placements, 4.09 on Faculty and 4.35 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology?
overview_faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology is around INR 54000 - INR 198000.

review_summary.college_name: Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college's infrastructure is good.

content.Placements: The percentage of the students is placed from the B.Tech, with a percentage of 75%, intermediate with 70 percent, and 10th with 65 percent. Top recruiting companies are HCL, Infosys, Deloitte, Accenture, and Sutherland. Internship is offered by the AICTE, Open Weave, and ICT Academy.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi are placed at branch department. Labs are good to practice with good labs incharge. Classrooms are good and have good ventilation. In hostels, there would be two different hostels for boys and girls separately, with a hostel warden, and also provide good food for the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with our HOD sir, faculty, and good placement.

content.Placements: 75% of students get placed every year. The highest package is 20 LPA, and the lowest package is 4.5 LPA. 60% of students got internships every year. Recruiting companies are Wipro and many more. All are provided by our college.
content.Infrastructure: Our facilities and infrastructure are nice. I am from CSE. The sports are conducted very well. Canteen food is so nice to eat. Mess is so nice. There is a medical room which is used by students when they are sick.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My college memories will last forever.

content.Placements: There are good placements in the college in companies like Infosys, Tech Mahindra, etc. The college also invited Sutherland, and I got selected for Sutherland. It has very good P&T department in college, and they will help students well. Placements are good here.
content.Infrastructure: My department is well-furnished. It has great lab facilities. All systems are Wi-Fi connected, and the Wi-Fi speed is very fast. Labs are too good. We have a huge library to refer to with a great collection of books. We have everything in the college, as I am a day scholar. I do not know about the hostel, but my friends stay in the hostel. They said they have very good food and great beds.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has a good infrastructure.

content.Placements: 70-80% of students got placed. The highest package is 25 LPA. Least package is 7 LPA, and the placement training is good. They conduct classes for placement assistance. The way of conducting the placement classes is also good so I advise joining.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure, playground, hostel, canteen, and bus facilities. All are good classes and washrooms are also maintained neatly. They provide libraries for gaining extra knowledge. It has extracurricular activities like programs, events, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placed in our college is 70%. The average package offered is more than 6 LPA in the college. The lowest package is 3 LPA and the highest package is 10 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are Tata Consultancy Services, Wipro, and IBM.
content.Infrastructure: Facilites and infrastructure are awesome. My course is AI ML which is artificial intelligence and machine learning. The college provides good labs and classrooms for study. The library has more books than our curriculum. Hostel facilities are also good.

admission_process.title: Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology considers scores in GATE, AP EAMCET, and AP PGECET for admission to specific courses.Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technologyoffers courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 72,000 - 1,98,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 70,000 - 1,00,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

hostel_campus.college_name: Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: This college's infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi are placed at branch department. Labs are good to practice with good labs incharge. Classrooms are good and have good ventilation. In hostels, there would be two different hostels for boys and girls separately, with a hostel warden, and also provide good food for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with our HOD sir, faculty, and good placement.
reviews.review_text: Our facilities and infrastructure are nice. I am from CSE. The sports are conducted very well. Canteen food is so nice to eat. Mess is so nice. There is a medical room which is used by students when they are sick.

reviews.review_heading: My college memories will last forever.
reviews.review_text: My department is well-furnished. It has great lab facilities. All systems are Wi-Fi connected, and the Wi-Fi speed is very fast. Labs are too good. We have a huge library to refer to with a great collection of books. We have everything in the college, as I am a day scholar. I do not know about the hostel, but my friends stay in the hostel. They said they have very good food and great beds.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure, playground, hostel, canteen, and bus facilities. All are good classes and washrooms are also maintained neatly. They provide libraries for gaining extra knowledge. It has extracurricular activities like programs, events, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Facilites and infrastructure are awesome. My course is AI ML which is artificial intelligence and machine learning. The college provides good labs and classrooms for study. The library has more books than our curriculum. Hostel facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with our college's maximum number of equipment and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college facilities are very good compared to the other colleges which are nearer. They provide Wi-Fi and computer labs for computer engineering students and electronic labs for electrical students and also in your free time you can access and use the library. Coming to the hostel, the facilities are also good. Food is neat and clean and tasteful and canteen is maintained very well. Medical facilities are only provided to the hostel students and sports are also given priority.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Devineni Venkata Ramana and Dr. Hima Sekhar MIC College of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very good and the main college infrastructure is very great. My course is also in managing the classroom, library, and good systems are installed in the college. Wi-Fi sometimes comes. In the canteen, the food is awesome and they provide various varieties.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the good infrastructure. It has good facilities like washrooms and a canteen.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms have very good infrastructure. Quality of facilities are available in our hostel. The quality of food is available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities, sports, and games are available. Our PT sir should take responsibility for students' games.

reviews.review_heading: I was satisfied with college studies and teaching. Good college.
reviews.review_text: High-quality labs and good quality of classrooms, best quality auditorium, better hostel, good canteen, good medical facilities, best environment. Yaa, you will have games period for the week and now they recently implemented sports as separate classes for each branch so that students can focus on sports too.

reviews.review_heading: It's better than other colleges but not the top one yet.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides near-perfect facilities for the students in the form of education, hostel, meals, clean drinking water, tidy classrooms, and toilets. They provide a laboratory for lab-related works and required equipment, and also a library for all courses.

reviews.review_heading: MIC College of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure and hostel, but the food and the maintenance are not much worthy of that. The food quality is not as good as it could be. The water is fine, and the college Wi-Fi is not accessible on students' phones, which is a major drawback.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfactory and also good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure like Wi-Fi are very good in classrooms as well as the hostel too. The labs provide much usefulness in our college. There are separate labs for every subject and lab in-charges and caretakers for every lab. The hostel is also good and the mess is very neat for boys as well as girls.

reviews.review_heading: MIC College of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good. AIML is a recently added course in our college; only one batch has graduated so far. Wi-Fi is not provided for students. Labs are good; all systems have Windows 10. Hostels are good, and the food is also good.

reviews.review_heading: MIC college of technology review.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are good. Recently, our college got an A+ in the NAAC inspection report. The college does not provide Wi-Fi, but there are good labs with all necessary equipment, good classrooms, and a big library.

reviews.review_heading: MIC College of Technology review.
reviews.review_text: My branch is AIML (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), and the infrastructure is very good in our college. However, there is no Wi-Fi for students in the college. A big library is available, and nice classrooms and labs are provided in our MIC College of Technology.

highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is St. Peter's Institute of Higher Education and Research. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the Outlook 2025, the institute ranked #25 under Deemed To Be University category. St. Peter's Institute of Higher Education and Research excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around St. Peter's Institute of Higher Education and Research rankings is covered in the following article:

outlook.description:
St. Peter's Institute of Higher Education and Research has received strong ranks by the Outlook under the 'Deemed To Be University' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the Outlook 2025. In the 'Deemed To Be University' category, the institute's ranks have ascended when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, St. Peter's Institute of Higher Education and Research climbed 15 ranks to #25 rank in the 'Deemed To Be University' category by the Outlook ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: St. Peter's Institute of Higher Education and Research Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Kitchens are well equipped with modern steam cooking systems. Clean and hygienic dining halls are maintained throughout. Hostels are provided with reading rooms, TV rooms and recreation halls. A doctor visits the college/hostels on all days to render medical attention for the needy students.

library.description: The University Library has 68069 Volumes of book and 27928 titles. The Library has 2047 books on the Book Bank section for SC/ST students. The Library also has a repository of Project Reports, Indian Standards Code books and CD-ROMS.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volley Ball, Kabaddi

reviews.review_heading: Review of St. Peter's Institute of Higher Education and Research.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure has been very good. Wi-Fi is there. We have very good libraries, high-level, and more than 3,000 books are there. College infrastructure is good and hostel is okay. Sometimes the food is very bad, sometimes food is very good so thank you.

reviews.review_heading: St. Peter's review and details clearly.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library, everything will be offered with good education facilities. Hostel was good and environment was peaceful. But food was average. Environment based was very good. But food was slightly different, you had to adjust if you were coming from other states. Also, they will provide best labs and these good environment will change your mind to study well.

reviews.review_heading: It's an all-rounder college with very good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: My college has great infrastructure, including the library, AC labs, and 24/7 Wi-Fi. The quality of facilities in my hostel is very good; the rooms are always clean, and the mess and canteen food are also edible. Medical facilities are available 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the culture.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are well maintained. They provide labs for all computer students, and classrooms are well maintained. They don't provide Wi-Fi. Canteens are well maintained; they provide all type of foods, like vegetarian and non-vegetarian food items, etc.

reviews.review_heading: This course has a separate building for different departments
reviews.review_text: There is library, studios, labs and these facilities are widely used by the students. The library has about 2000 books regarding architecture and it is very useful to refer. The studios are widely used with big tables it is useful for interaction and submission purposes, it is mainly used to explore concepts and new ideas.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the infrastructure and teachers of our college.
reviews.review_text: Our college played a moderate role in infrastructure. Labs were very well-maintained with quality and hi-fi equipment. The hostel facility was somewhat fine. The food served was better, but the rooms were not up to the mark. Sports and games were good enough.

reviews.review_heading: We have the best placement opportunities in our college.
reviews.review_text: We have a good library in college and a separate hostel for boys and a separate hostel for girls. The college has very fast Wi-Fi issued to students by their ID number. Classrooms are very spacious and comfortable. A huge auditorium is also present.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the placement officer's poor communication and response.
reviews.review_text: The campus is huge and beautiful classrooms are regularly maintained neatly. We don't have proper lab facility for automobile department. The university must build the proper labs particularly for automobile department. We don't expect the management to build labs.

reviews.review_heading: Poor faculty, good infrastructure. A college for the average students.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good. There are over 8 huge blocks with over 300 classrooms catering to over 8000 students. There are good labs, clean water and restroom facilities on all floors. There is a hostel for men and women. Sports facilities are available with well-maintained grounds. There is a free of cost medical centre with admitting beds for students inside the campus. There are over 6 canteens and 1 cafe (coffee day) inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Day by day status is going down.
reviews.review_text: I can say, the fee was quite cheap in our time. We did our course at a lower cost compared with others colleges in Chennai. Nowadays, they increased the fee a little bit higher, that's the reason students are coming less. Lab and classroom are good enough. Canteen available in the hostel is not good. Mainly the food is not good.

St peters university has opened the engineering departments after becoming a deemed university just for business with no placement. The level of education is average . The college is lease bothered about the well-fair for the students. It standard of education went down as soon it became a deemed university . There is only a hand full of good faculty to guide the students. Any issue the first thing the college ask is only cash. The chairman was the ex-education minister of TM and did not agree t... reviews.review_heading: If you are looking to get only degree in a budget, you can join.
reviews.review_text: There are enough facilities in this college for every department except journalism. It's good to choose the most common degrees or if you have another unique or important course in mind that is your life goal, don't prefer this college to you.

reviews.review_heading: St. Peters institute of Higher educational and research
reviews.review_text:
The facilities like computers, big ground, bus and travel facilities, free books, good food in canteen, good maintain bathrooms, new library are free WiFi facilities available
Hostel are very poor, foods are very un quality, non veg is very good, free medical facilities and all sports conduct

reviews.review_heading: I love the experience got in this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available here, and classrooms are available enormously. There are labs, and in the labs, all the equipment is in working condition. You get good food here compared to other colleges. However, small shops are available inside the campus, and a CCD cafe is also available. Moreover, there are many shops outside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is affordable. There is no good placements taken place yet.
reviews.review_text: Every department have separate blocks and it's very good. Every department has its own lab. The building is not in high infrastructure. it's very bad to study in that atmosphere. No medical facilities are available. Sports students cannot evolve their games.
